title: vandellia alsinoides
intro: Vandellia alsinoides, also known as "Kalmegh" or "Amritha," is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various compounds such as vandellin and vandeten. The health benefits of Vandellia alsinoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Vandellia alsinoides can be found in the form of tea, powder, or decoction, often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
